podcasts.name: Unsupervised Learning
podcasts.title: AI Research Legend’s Honest Assessment of Where We Are
podcasts.transcript: Is reasoning enough to get to generalization or is another method needed? >> It does feel like there is something else that possibly could generalize much better. >> Why do you think Anthropic was the first to be like really successful on the coding side? >> Antropic made this very good decision to focus on coding. We talked about what the future research directions that he's really excited about and we also hit on a bunch of things around how he thinks the ecosystem will evolve from open versus closed source model to application companies.
